section.heading: Provision of hyperbaric oxygen therapy for certain members

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: The Secretary may furnish hyperbaric oxygen therapy available at a military medical treatment facility to a covered member if such therapy is prescribed by a physician to treat post-traumatic stress disorder or traumatic brain injury.

subsection.heading: Covered Member Defined.—
subsection.chapeau: In this section, the term “covered member” means a member of the armed forces who is—

paragraph.content: diagnosed with post-traumatic stress disorder or traumatic brain injury.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 115–91, div. A, title VII, § 703(a)(1), Dec. 12, 2017, 131 Stat. 1435.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Pub. L. 115–91, div. A, title VII, § 703(b), Dec. 12, 2017, 131 Stat. 1435, provided that: “The amendments made by subsection (a) [enacting this section] shall take effect 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [Dec. 12, 2017].”
